reviews.comment:
Excelente ubicación.... Es el punto de reunión de las estafas de facebook. La nafta? De lo peor de Sudamérica..... Vayan a la Shell de enfrente o a la Axion de al lado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location... It's the hotspot for Facebook scams. Gasoline? Some of the worst in South America. Go to the Shell across the street or the Axion next door.

reviews.comment:
Son una miredad como tencion, se negegaron a emprestarle un baño a una mujer que ne secitaba ir urgente,

(Translated by Google)
They are a disgrace, they refused to lend a bathroom to a woman who urgently needed to go.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, MiniMarket bastante completo y lo más importante que andaba el aire para medir la presión de los neumáticos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, MiniMarket was quite complete, and most importantly, the tire pressure was working to measure the tires.
